name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for ascentia-core
labels: enhancement

## Problem / use case

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

Describe the API or behavior you want (optional: sketch code or config).

## Alternatives considered

What else did you consider?

## Scope

Does this belong in `pkg/agent_core` (pure engine), `internal/` (adapters/gateway), or documentation only?
